scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/data -w packages/services -w packages/ui --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/data -w packages/services -w packages/ui -w apps/audioguide-app --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/data -w packages/services -w packages/ui --if-present
scripts.format: npm run format -w packages/data -w packages/services -w packages/ui --if-present
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check -w packages/data -w packages/services -w packages/ui --if-present
